items.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue strikes despite ceasefire agreement
items.summary: Deaths are reported in southern Lebanon, with the IDF saying it hit "Hezbollah terrorist targets" after the group fired over 50 projectiles at Israeli forces.

items.title: Tourist dies in Dominican Republic luxury resort fire
items.summary: Nearly 1,700 people were evacuated from the huge blaze at Viva Wyndham Dominicus Beach in Bayahibe, a popular resort town on the Caribbean coast.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 罔顧禁令 數百名反伊朗人士執意在巴黎示威 約20人被捕
